prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约12493名→14400名→15871名→5198名→3794名。2021–2023年位次持续后移，累计后移约3400名；但2024年起出现大幅跃升，较2023年前移约10673名，2025年进一步前移至3794名，近两年累计前移约12077名，表明该校在山东省的报考热度与认可度显著提升。2025年基准位次约3794名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年182人、2022年182人、2023年189人、2024年189人、2025年181人；2026年计划165人，较2025年减少16人（缩招约8.8%），缩招将加剧竞争，推动位次进一步前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第25名→2022年第24名→2023年第25名→2024年第23名→2025年第21名→2026年第23名，稳居全国前25名，属于顶尖工科强校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生被地方黑恶势力殴打，校方被指偏袒不作为），可能轻微影响部分考生报考意愿；抖音综合热度排名第74位（评价为一般），短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显热度爆发信号；历史投档异常记录中未见西工大相关断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+为三大王牌学科；另有机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科。招生专业中的航空航天类、计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类等均直接对应上述优势学科，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与西工大优势学科高度吻合，推高相关专业组报考热度；山东省考生总数：2021年54.4万→2022年59.5万→2023年66.2万→2024年66.6万→2025年68.1万→2026年约72万，逐年递增，2026年较2025年增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），竞争加剧；省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在441–444分之间，未出现剧烈波动；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市，在山东省招生占比约18.2%（2025年109人/全国598人），属于跨省招生比例较高的省份，山东考生对该校认可度持续上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3794名、2026年招生计划缩招约8.8%、山东省考生增加约5.7%以及学校层次持续提升等关键因素，竞争加剧推动位次前移；声誉偏负面和抖音热度一般形成轻微抵消。预测2026年最低录取位次约3543名，波动区间3043–4043名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（黄玉珊航空班）
- 航空航天类（陈士橹飞天班）
- 航空航天类（智慧三航拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 航空航天类（航天/航空）
- 电子信息类（电子信息）
- 自动化类

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（3043–4043名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档王牌班级（黄玉珊班、陈士橹班、智慧三航拔尖班）作为冲刺，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（3043名以内）可重点冲刺一档航空航天拔尖班和计算机类；位次接近区间上限（4043名附近）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 12493 → 14400 → 15871 → 5198 → 3794. Rankings continued to decline from 2021 to 2023, with a cumulative decline of about 3400 places; however, a significant leap occurred in 2024, moving forward by about 10673 places compared to 2023, and further advanced to 3794 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 12077 places in the last two years, indicating a significant increase in the popularity and recognition of this university in Shandong Province. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3794. The enrollment plan for this university in the comprehensive category in Shandong Province: 182 in 2021, 182 in 2022, 189 in 2023, 189 in 2024, 181 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 165, a decrease of 16 compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 8.8%), which will intensify competition and further push the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 25th in 2021 → 24th in 2022 → 25th in 2023 → 23rd in 2024 → 21st in 2025 → 23rd in 2026, consistently ranking among the top 25 in the country, making it a top-tier engineering powerhouse. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students assaulted by local criminal elements, with the university accused of favoritism and inaction), which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (rated as average), with short video exposure at a medium-to-low level, showing no obvious signs of a popularity explosion. No historical admission anomalies related to NPU have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Aerospace Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, and Materials Science and Engineering A+ are the three flagship disciplines; additionally, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above. Majors in the enrollment plan such as Aerospace, Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation directly correspond to these advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, closely aligning with NPU's advantageous disciplines, boosting the popularity of related major groups. Total number of candidates in Shandong Province: 544,000 in 2021 → 595,000 in 2022 → 662,000 in 2023 → 666,000 in 2024 → 681,000 in 2025 → approximately 720,000 in 2026, increasing year by year, with an increase of about 39,000 from 2025 to 2026 (an increase of about 5.7%), intensifying competition. The provincial control line (regular batch one) has been stable between 441 and 444 points in recent years, with no drastic fluctuations. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and the enrollment proportion in Shandong Province is about 18.2% (109 out of 598 nationally in 2025), making it a province with a relatively high cross-provincial enrollment ratio, and Shandong candidates' recognition of this university continues to rise.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering key factors such as the baseline ranking of 3794 in 2025, an enrollment plan reduction of about 8.8% in 2026, an increase of about 5.7% in Shandong candidates, and the continuous improvement of the university's level, intensified competition will push the ranking forward; the slightly negative reputation and average Douyin popularity will have a minor offsetting effect. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 3543, with a fluctuation range of 3043–4043.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (3043–4043), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 flagship classes (Huang Yushan Class, Chen Shiliu Class, Smart Three-Aerospace Top Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 3043), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 aerospace top classes and computer science; if your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (around 4043), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.
